main.description: Write access to a user's plyr.fm data. Clients request include:fm.plyr.authFullApp at sign-in and the PDS expands it into the collections this set currently lists — the set can evolve without clients changing their scope request.
main.title: Full plyr.fm Access
main.detail: Provides full access to all plyr.fm features including uploading and managing tracks, playlists, likes, and comments.
